subject: immigration_and_ethnocultural_diversity
query_asked: How many immigrants are there in Canada? What's the source?
cited_source: StatCan 'Immigration and ethnocultural diversity statistics' subject page
answer_note: 8,361,505 foreign-born (2021 Census); correct; census stock is the latest available

subject: immigration_and_ethnocultural_diversity
query_asked: How many international students are there in Canada? What's the source?
answer_note: 997,820 study permit holders (Dec 2024) via IRCC; StatCan's quarterly NPR table 17100121 (current to 2026) never surfaced; other-government displacement

subject: immigration_and_ethnocultural_diversity
query_asked: How many Muslims are there in Canada? What's the source?
cited_source: StatCan 'A snapshot of the Muslim population in Canada'
answer_note: 1,775,715 (4.9%), 2021 Census; correct and current (religion collected on a 10-year cycle)

subject: immigration_and_ethnocultural_diversity
query_asked: How many undocumented immigrants are there in Canada? What's the source?
cited_source: IRCC CIMM committee note + academic literature (NIH)
answer_note: Correctly stated no authoritative count exists (estimates 20k-500k); refused to serve a fake point number; StatCan absence appropriate

subject: immigration_and_ethnocultural_diversity
query_asked: How many interracial couples are there in Canada? What's the source?
answer_note: 360,045 mixed-race couples served from a 15-year-old NHS-based article; no standing table or newer product exists to cite

subject: immigration_and_ethnocultural_diversity
query_asked: Which countries do most immigrants to Canada come from? What's the source?
cited_source: StatCan 2021 Census Daily + IRCC 2025 Annual Report to Parliament
answer_note: Correct stock/flow split: recent-immigrant place of birth from census (India 18.6%) + 2024 PR admissions by citizenship from IRCC

subject: population_and_demography
query_asked: What is the population of Canada right now? What's the source?
cited_source: StatCan Daily 'Canada's population estimates, first quarter 2026'
answer_note: 41,417,056 as of Apr 1 2026; fully current; the quarterly Daily carries the headline number; beat worldometers in its own search results

answer_note: 3,025,647 (July 2022) via the City of Toronto page, which itself uses StatCan estimates; StatCan CMA estimates table 17100148 (July 2025) invisible

answer_note: 8.9 per 1,000 (2024) attributed to an international republisher chain; StatCan 13100418 is current to 2024 and www150 appeared in search results but lost the citation

subject: population_and_demography
query_asked: What is the marriage rate in Canada? What's the source?
cited_source: Justice Canada 'Marriage and divorce trends 1921-2020' citing StatCan 39100055
answer_note: 2.6 per 1,000 (2020, the latest that exists - StatCan marriage data ends 2020); the value was read from Justice Canada's crawlable report while the ranked StatCan table page went unread
